content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Medical Marijuana Clinic: Remote Scheduling Specialist Anywhere in the World Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5887/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://medicalmarijuanaclinicflorida.com/">https://medicalmarijuanaclinicflorida.com/</a> </p> <p>Join our innovative Medical Marijuana Clinic as a Remote Scheduling Specialist and play a vital role in supporting patients on their wellness journey. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work remotely while ensuring seamless appointment coordination within the health, wellness, and fitness industry.</p><p>As a key member of our team, you will help optimize patient access to care by managing schedules efficiently and professionally. Your organizational skills and attention to detail will directly contribute to enhancing the overall patient experience.</p><h2><strong>Key Objectives</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Coordinate and manage patient appointments with accuracy and timeliness.</p></li><li><p>Facilitate smooth communication between patients, healthcare providers, and administrative staff.</p></li><li><p>Maintain up-to-date scheduling records and ensure compliance with clinic policies.</p></li><li><p>Support the clinic’s mission by delivering exceptional service in a remote setting.</p></li></ul><h2><strong>Responsibilities</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments via phone, email, and scheduling software.</p></li><li><p>Maintain accurate patient records and update scheduling databases regularly.</p></li><li><p>Respond promptly to patient inquiries and provide information regarding appointment availability and clinic services.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate with healthcare providers to optimize daily schedules and accommodate urgent appointments.</p></li><li><p>Identify and resolve scheduling conflicts or issues proactively.</p></li><li><p>Ensure all scheduling activities comply with HIPAA and clinic confidentiality standards.</p></li><li><p>Assist with administrative tasks as needed to support clinic operations.</p></li></ul><h2><strong>Requirements</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Proven experience in scheduling, appointment coordination, or related administrative roles, preferably in healthcare or wellness settings.</p></li><li><p>Strong proficiency with scheduling software and Microsoft Office Suite.</p></li><li><p>Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.</p></li><li><p>Ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently in a remote work environment.</p></li><li><p>Detail-oriented with strong organizational abilities.</p></li><li><p>Reliable internet connection and a dedicated home workspace.</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with HIPAA regulations and patient confidentiality best practices is a plus.</p></li></ul><h2><strong>Qualifications</strong></h2><ul><li><p>High school diploma or equivalent required; associate degree or higher preferred.</p></li><li><p>Previous experience in medical or wellness clinic settings is highly desirable.</p></li><li><p>Customer service or patient-facing experience is an advantage.</p></li></ul><h2><strong>Benefits</strong></h2><ul><li><p>Fully remote position offering flexibility and work-life balance.</p></li><li><p>Competitive compensation and performance incentives.</p></li><li><p>Opportunities for professional growth within the health and wellness industry.</p></li><li><p>Supportive team culture focused on employee well-being.</p></li><li><p>Access to industry-related training and resources.</p></li></ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/medical-marijuana-clinic-remote-scheduling-specialist">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/medical-marijuana-clinic-remote-scheduling-specialist</a></p> United States of America California All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5884/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.toptal.com/">https://www.toptal.com/</a> </p> <h2>About the Role</h2> <p>We're looking for a Technical Program Manager to lead complex SAP master data transformation programs — spanning S/4HANA migrations, master data governance, and cross-domain data architecture. This isn't a role for someone who manages timelines from the sidelines: you'll need real technical depth in SAP MDG and master data design to make credible calls, sequence cutovers, and serve as the authoritative technical voice across delivery, functional, and platform teams. If you can pair program leadership with hands-on SAP architecture fluency, this role gives you ownership over both the "how" and the "when."</p> <h2>What You'll Do</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Own program-level planning and sequencing for SAP master data initiatives, including migration cutover timing, dependency mapping, and freeze procedures</p> </li> <li> <p>Serve as the authoritative technical advisor across delivery, functional, and platform teams on master data architecture decisions</p> </li> <li> <p>Define and oversee the target-state data model across master data domains (e.g., Customer/Business Partner, Material, Vendor, Finance)</p> </li> <li> <p>Lead design conversations on conversion strategy, hierarchy/classification structures, and golden-record/system-of-record rules</p> </li> <li> <p>Set technical standards for data model extensions, custom fields, and governance workflows (e.g., SAP MDG, BRF+, change request design)</p> </li> <li> <p>Own the mock-load cadence, defect triage process, and reconciliation framework, ensuring data integrity through migration</p> </li> <li> <p>Coordinate cross-functional teams to manage risk, resolve blockers, and keep migration programs on schedule and in scope</p> </li> <li> <p>Provide architectural review for new integrations and downstream distribution patterns touching master data</p> </li> <li> <p>Maintain transparent stakeholder communication, including status reporting, milestone tracking, and tr
